definition_en: The gradual loss of intensity of a seismic wave as it travels through the Earth's interior.
example_en: The high attenuation of seismic waves in the mantle provides clues about the temperature and composition of the rock.
note: 想像聲音傳過牆壁會變小聲，地震波在岩層中傳遞時能量也會被吸收或散射，這就是衰減。

definition_en: A seismic phenomenon where tectonic plates slide past each other at a very slow rate, releasing energy over days to months without generating typical devastating seismic waves.
example_en: The PINN-based framework successfully forecasted the evolution of the 2010 slow slip event in the Bungo Channel.
note: 與一般地震在幾秒內釋放能量不同，慢滑移像是在「慢跑」，花費數週甚至數月釋放能量，是科學家預測大地震的重要前兆線索。
